description: ICCP is an international, English-speaking church in Aix-en-Provence, France. Our Vision, Mission, Values, and Practices are stated as follows: It is our Mission to provide life-changing encounters with God to the English-speaking community in Provence. As we do this, we also desire to be used by God to shine the light of Jesus among the local French with whom we live. It is our Vision to see ICCP as a church abiding in Christ, connecting with others, and being a blessing in Provence and beyond. Our Values & Practices •Abide – Growing in studying Scripture and active in prayer, allowing the word of Christ to dwell richly in us. •Connect – Intentionally developing grace-filled relationships through serving one another, opening up our community and our lives to one another. •Bless – Meeting the needs of those around us, multiplying our life and community, and sharing the message of Jesus both in France and the world. These Values and Practices are based on the Word of God; we will make every effort to live them out and hold ourselves accountable to them as a community of God’s people.

name: Antalya Akdeniz Jubilee Church
description: Akdeniz Jubilee Church is an English speaking, international, interdenominational congregation serving the expatriate community in Antalya and seeking to follow Jesus together. On any given SATURDAY our congregation is likely to have people from up to 10 different nations. There are Europeans, North and South Americans, Africans and Asians, all drawn together by our common love for the Lord Jesus and our desire to follow him. All of us speak English to a lesser or greater extent; some of us as our mother tongue, others as our second, third, fourth or fifth language. We understand that Jesus’ call to follow him, is also a call to walk with others. We recognize that can sometimes be difficult; none of us are perfect and there are many cultural differences to navigate. But the richness of the life and fellowship that we have together by God’s grace is well worth it. We’d love to have you become part of our community as we seek to follow Jesus, become more like him, and serve others in his name. Join us any Saturday afternoon at Mozaik Cultural Center in Konyaaltı.

name: Antalya Saint Paul Union Church
description: Saint Paul Union Church is an English speaking, evangelical congregation serving the expatriate community in Antalya and seeking to follow Jesus together. On any given Sunday our congregation is likely to have people from up to 20 different nations. There are Europeans and North Americans, Africans and Asians, Australasians and Pacific Islanders, all drawn together by our common love for the Lord Jesus and our desire to follow him. All of us speak English to a lesser or greater extent; some of us as our mother tongue, others as our second, third, fourth or fifth language. We understand that Jesus’ call to follow him, is also a call to walk with others. We recognize that can sometimes be difficult; none of us are perfect and there are many cultural differences to navigate. But the richness of the life and fellowship that we have together by God’s grace is well worth it.

name: Antwerp International Protestant Church

We welcome you to join us in worship or visit one of our Bible study groups or social events.

Our aim is to glorify God in all that we do; and to that end we strive to let the word of Christ dwell in us and to set our affections on things above and not on things of this world. Unified by our love of Him who gave Himself for us and redeemed us unto Himself, we worship together and admonish one another to grow in grace and in the knowledge of Christ. We meet corporately every week; and we count one another as our closest friends, our family.

Community Groups and other ministries such as women and men's ministries beyond the Sunday Service are well developed. Additionally, the church offers English-speaking basic Christian services for example water baptism, marriage, child dedication, pastoral care, prayer and anointing with oil. For all the details, please visit the website.

name: Bonn American Protestant Church
description: We are a Protestant church in style, but we welcome all denominations, no matter what your Christian background. APC is an international family, building strong bonds which oftentimes last for a lifetime. Over time, our church family has spread all over the world. We always were and are a church in transition, because many of our members stay in Bonn only for a temporary assignment. APC is even more a focal point for them: People come here to meet others who speak English, to get to know people after moving to Bonn, to see friends and to find new ones, and of course to worship together. We hope that everyone who comes to us for the first time feels the warmth and openness that is part of our nature. We seek to be engaged locally and around the world, to listen and to learn, to embody justice and compassion, and to share the love of Jesus Christ in tangible ways as we journey together. We look forward to meeting you!

name: Chertsey International Community Church
description: The vision for our congregation is “Following Jesus Together.” From the very beginning, the call of Jesus was, “Follow me.” By his grace, through faith and the power of the Gospel, he enables us to follow him. From the book of Acts, we see that the term, “Christian,” was actually a term used by people outside the church. The “Christians” called themselves, “believers,” “disciples,” and “followers” of “The Way.” In some ways, it is easy to call ourselves “Christians.” Perhaps the term has lost its potency–it is enough to identify one’s team, but says nothing about how one lives. In any sport, everyone on the team wears the same color jersey. But some sit on the sidelines while others are in the game. We don’t want to be sideline sitters. We get on the field and live the life that Jesus called us to live. This life of faith is really something that can only be lived together. In fact, spiritual growth always happens best in community. Jesus did not call us to walk alone as we follow him. In the Bible, we find many descriptions of the church. One of the best is that the church is a family. We have been adopted into God’s family–God is our father, and we are all brothers and sisters. Although we come from many countries and backgrounds, in Christ, we are family. So if you want to keep off the sidelines, follow Jesus, and do it with a great group of people, welcome home.

name: Cobham International Community Church
description: The vision for our congregation is “Following Jesus Together.” From the very beginning, the call of Jesus was, “Follow me.” By his grace, through faith and the power of the Gospel, he enables us to follow him. From the book of Acts, we see that the term, “Christian,” was actually a term used by people outside the church. The “Christians” called themselves, “believers,” “disciples,” and “followers” of “The Way.” In some ways, it is easy to call ourselves “Christians.” Perhaps the term has lost its potency–it is enough to identify one’s team, but says nothing about how one lives. In any sport, everyone on the team wears the same color jersey. But some sit on the sidelines while others are in the game. We don’t want to be sideline sitters. We get on the field and live the life that Jesus called us to live. This life of faith is really something that can only be lived together. In fact, spiritual growth always happens best in community. Jesus did not call us to walk alone as we follow him. In the Bible, we find many descriptions of the church. One of the best is that the church is a family. We have been adopted into God’s family–God is our father, and we are all brothers and sisters. Although we come from many countries and backgrounds, in Christ, we are family. So if you want to keep off the sidelines, follow Jesus, and do it with a great group of people, welcome home.

name: Delft Redeemer International Church
description: We exist to spread the good news of Jesus wider into our culture and deeper into our lives. Redeemer Delft is more than just Sunday meetings. We also have midweek small groups – we call them “Life Groups”, which meet in people’s homes across the city -, and plenty of social events and serving opportunities to help you get connected. Many people ask, “What sort of church is Redeemer Delft?”. The best way to answer this question is probably saying that Redeemer is an international church that loves God, loves people, loves the Bible, and wants to show that the message of Jesus is relevant today for all people, everywhere!

We are united by the principle that in the essentials there should be unity, in all else there should be charity.” We look forward to welcoming you on Sunday., Pastor Dan Axtell

name: Frankfurt International Christian Fellowship
description: We are a diverse, Christ-centred, English-speaking community called to fulfil the Great Commandment and the Great Commission right here in Frankfurt, Germany. We believe and confess that Jesus Christ has reconciled our relationship to God (Col 1:19-20), to neighbour (2 Cor. 5:16-21) and to creation (Rom 8:18-25). This means that our surrounding culture provides the stage on which our reconciled relationships to God and neighbour will be played out before our neighbours, colleagues, friends and family. Whether you are a teacher, consultant, parent or student, we aim, as a church, to equip, encourage, support and empower you for the ministry to which God has called you.

name: Gdansk Gospel Church
description: The worship services typically last about 1.5 hours, and they include singing and a sermon based on the Bible. Our hope is that you would encounter Jesus at Gospel Church. On the first Sunday of every month we celebrate the Lord's Supper (or Communion), by eating bread and drinking wine to remember Christ's sacrifice on the cross. We want Gospel Church to be a church full of grace and truth, and a safe place to have questions and doubts.

description: Located in a University city with 25% of students, and a significant part of them on international English medium programmes, our congregation underlies natural fluctuation, and we may not be of impressive size. Even more so, a family atmosphere and caring for each other is at the heart of our little church. During the worship service, we love to praise our Lord with upbeat music, supported by our beautiful band. There is meaningful Bible-based preaching as well as contemplative elements like a time of testimonies, personal sharing time and praying for each other. The church service is held in English, but we do also include elements in other languages where needed.The languages spoken in our congregation are: English, German, Spanish, Hindi, Urdu, Tamil, French and Serbo-Croatian

We camp together in the summer, teenagers even twice a year. Three things are important for us: Christ is the center, we are multicultural family and we share our faith with others.

name: Hamburg City Church
description: We want IBC to be a place where everyone feels welcome, where deep relationships can be built that will help us follow Jesus, a safe place where faith can grow. Our services and programs are open to anyone. You do not need to have to be a member of IBC or even consider yourself a Christian. We do hope, however, that you would meet Jesus here. So, please do feel free to attend our programs. If you have relocated to Hamburg recently and you are looking for a new home church we would like to get to know you. Please meet us at the Connection Center after the church service or contact the pastors via email.

name: Holy Cross Parish
description: We are a community of Christian believers who seek to live lives that give glory to our God and Savior. We come from a variety of church backgrounds: Anglicans, Baptists, Lutherans, Methodists, Presbyterians, Reformed, Roman Catholics, non-denominational, and others. The ICV is non-denominational; that is to say that we are not affiliated with any specific church. We aim to be a Christ-centered community where people from all church backgrounds can feel part of the family. We hold fast to the teachings of the Apostles's Creed and seek to live in accordance with God’s revealed word, the Bible. We are also a charitable organization that seeks to support the less privileged, orphans, persecuted Christians, and internally displaced Christians around the world, especially in developing countries and their surrounding regions.

name: Hope International Bible & Mission Church

We are God’s portable sanctuary in the world but kingdom citizens of God—this is where we belong, where we get our identity and where we are going, and we are not alone.

description: Igreja Bola de Neve is a Non-denominational church in São Paulo, Brazil, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: Igreja Central
description: Igreja Central is an evangelical church in São Paulo offering services entirely in Portuguese, including Sunday family worship at 9:30am and Wednesday prayer gatherings. The church is known for its Adoração Central worship ministry and Core youth program, with online streaming available for remote participation.

name: Igreja Consolação Correia
description: Paróquia Nossa Senhora da Consolação e Correia é uma igreja católica em Belo Horizonte administrada pelos padres agostinianos desde 1934, inicialmente construída como capela do Colégio Santo Agostinho. A paróquia oferece catequese completa desde a iniciação cristã de adultos até a crisma, além de manter uma relíquia de primeiro grau de São Carlo Acutis para veneração permanente.

name: Igreja Evangelica Louvor Na Terra
description: Igreja Evangelica Louvor Na Terra is a Pentecostal church located in Botucatu, São Paulo. As a Pentecostal congregation, the church emphasizes the gifts of the Holy Spirit including speaking in tongues, divine healing, and prophetic ministry in their worship services.

name: Igreja Mana Porto
description: Igreja Mana Porto is a Pentecostal church in Porto, Portugal, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: Igreja Messiânica Mundial do Brasil
description: Igreja Messiânica Mundial do Brasil centers its spiritual practice around three distinctive pillars: Johrei (channeling Divine Light for spiritual purification), Natural Agriculture conducted with love and respect for nature, and Belo (beauty appreciation to ennoble human sensitivity). This Portuguese-speaking non-denominational church offers unique ministries including floral art (Ikebana), home gardening programs, and comprehensive youth formation alongside traditional prayer and missionary work.

name: Igreja Missionária Evangélica Maranata
description: Igreja Missionária Evangélica Maranata is a Pentecostal evangelical church with 14 locations across Rio de Janeiro, offering services in Portuguese on Sundays and Thursdays with live streaming available. The church emphasizes the baptism with the Holy Spirit alongside solid biblical foundation, prioritizing Scripture-based teaching and encouraging genuine spiritual experiences for all believers.

name: Igreja Pentecostal Yeshua Emanuel
description: Igreja Pentecostal Yeshua Emanuell organizes worship around specialized services including the distinctive Culto da Palavra Revelada (Revealed Word Service) and separate ministries for men, women, families, and youth. The church emphasizes biblical revelation through its structured approach to different demographic groups within the congregation.

name: Igreja Pentecostal Yeshua Emanuell
description: Igreja Pentecostal Yeshua Emanuell is a Portuguese-speaking Pentecostal church in Belo Horizonte that organizes worship around specialized ministries for different groups. The church offers distinct services including Culto da Palavra Revelada (Revealed Word Service), along with dedicated gatherings for families, men, women, and youth (Mocidade).

name: Igreja Presbiteriana Unida de São Paulo
Igreja Unasp SP
description: Igreja Unasp SP is an Adventist church community in São Paulo focused on being a place of encounter with God, offering weekly meetings and various ministry programs.

name: Igreja do Recreio
description: Igreja do Recreio is an evangelical community in Recreio that uniquely describes itself as 'figital' - blending physical and digital ministry to reach both local and global audiences. The church offers sign language classes alongside traditional ministries, demonstrating practical inclusivity in their Portuguese-speaking congregation.

name: Igreja em Belo Horizonte
description: Igreja em Belo Horizonte (IGBH) is a church community serving the Belo Horizonte area in Brazil, presenting themselves through a modern website with a green and black design theme.

name: Immanuel Church
description: Immanuel Church is an evangelical congregation in Stockholm that celebrates worship services in three languages: Swedish, English, and Korean. The church has developed an original music project called 'Songs from Immanuel,' where young people, musicians, and theologians collaborate to create psalm-inspired songs with accessible melodies and prayer-like lyrics.

name: Immanuel Church
description: Immanuel Church is an united_reformed church in Bournemouth. Explore their worship and community details before your first visit.

name: Immanuelskyrkan
description: Immanuelskyrkan is an evangelical church in Malmö where hundreds gather weekly for worship services offered in Swedish with live translation to Farsi and English. The church focuses on investing in the next generation and building a congregation large enough to impact the entire city through comprehensive ministries including Alpha courses, prayer ministry, and small groups.

name: In My Father's House International Church Abu Dhabi.
InSalvation
description: Active since 2006, a cornerstone of the Dutch Christian worship scene. Energetic pop-infused rock worship. Regular performers at the Opwekking festival.

name: Inclusive Community Church
description: An inclusive Metropolitan Community Church in Bournemouth welcoming LGBTQ+ people and all communities. They emphasize contemporary worship, biblical dialogue, and spiritual values over rules.

name: Influencers Church
description: Influencers Church is a Non-denominational church in Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: International Baptist Church Cologne
description: International Baptist Church Cologne is an English-speaking Baptist church in Cologne with Sunday worship, life groups, discipleship, and a visible leadership structure.

name: International Baptist Church of Bratislava
description: We warmly invite you to join us for worship, fellowship and friendship, whether you are new in the city, passing through or a more permanent resident of Bratislava., We serve the English-speaking community of Bratislava, focusing on preaching the Word of God, facilitating authentic worship through prayer, music and fellowship, creating a sense of family and belonging, as well as reaching out to others who need to hear the Good News of the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

name: International Baptist Church of Stuttgart
description: IBC Stuttgart is a community of believers who seek to focus on God through Jesus Christ, encourage one another, and serve others locally and abroad. Our primary language is English, but we also support various ministry opportunities in German, Spanish, and other languages. Our vision is to be a church that is growing in Christ and growing his kingdom.

name: International Central Gospel Church
description: International Central Gospel Church is a Pentecostal church in Accra, Ghana, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: International Central Gospel Church- Hosanna Temple, Teshie
International Christian Assembly
description: International Christian Assembly is a Non-denominational church in Tokyo, Japan, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: International Christian Assembly Kyiv
description: We are a community of internationals in Kyiv, Ukraine who join together to grow in our faith, support each other in our walk with God and celebrate all that God is doing in and through us. We welcome you!

name: International Christian Center Athens
description: We are a Spirit-filled international church located in the northern suburb of Nea Erithrea. We welcome you to our services every Sunday starting at 10:30 am with time of fellowship. Whether you live in Athens or are just passing through, coming out of curiosity or with the desire to know God in a more personal and intimate way, we believe that your encounter with Jesus will mark your life for eternity. Location: Domotel Kastri Hotel FREE PARKING 🅿️ available! ICCA is an English speaking church in Athens. #englishspeakingchurch #ICCA #athens #internationalchurchathens #internationalchristiancenterathens #spiritfilledchurchathens

name: International Christian Church Bangkok
description: International Christian Church Bangkok is a Non-denominational church in Bangkok, Thailand, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: International Christian Church of Marseille
description: English-speaking, International, Evangelical Church.

name: International Christian Community Madrid
description: Welcome to International Christian Community Madrid, an international Bible-centered church plant located in the Aravaca neighborhood of the city. Whether you’re new to Madrid, seeking an English-speaking church, or looking for a place to strengthen your faith, we invite you to join us. Together, we’ll grow in our walk with God and support one another as we impact our community with the love and truth of Jesus. No matter where you are in your spiritual journey, you are welcome here! ​

name: International Christian Fellowship
description: Gospel-centered Christian church in Limassol, Cyprus, affiliated with International Christian Fellowship. They emphasize biblical teaching and community worship.

name: International Christian Fellowship
description: ICF is an international, interdenominational church in Wageningen. We are very happy to welcome you!

name: International Christian Fellowship Portimão
description: We are always pleased to welcome residents and visitors alike whatever their background or church affiliation. The service usually includes choruses, a talk for the children, prayers, Bible readings, hymns and an address for the adults. A Sunday School for the children operates during part of the service and coffee is provided after the service for a time of fellowship.

name: International Church of Athens
description: International Church of Athens is a Non-denominational church in Athens, Greece, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: International Church of Bordeaux
description: Bordeaux Church was started at Easter 2014 with the following aims: 1) to be a city centre church. Central Bordeaux has over 200 000 inhabitants and there are too few Bible churches. 2) to show God's love in Jesus Christ for all the people of the world by uniting around the good news of Jesus and to communicate that love to all. To begin with we are an English-language church worshipping in English - in simple English. However we want to become a multi-lingual church as soon as possible. We can imagine the following steps: a. simultaneous translation of the messages into French, as soon as we have a suitable premises, equipment and interpreters b. adding a French pastor to our team to be able to begin a French worship service. c. perhaps following these same stages with other languages and communities.

name: International Church of Leiden
description: We seek to be a Christ-centred international community that is planted to worship, grow and serve in the Leiden area and beyond. We are made up of many nationalities who come together in our diversity, uniting around faith in Jesus Christ., Our kids groups on Sundays are in English and Dutch.

name: International Church of Rome
description: We are a church for internationals and Italians living in the Rome area. We would love to have you come and join us as we grow together in God’s grace and fellowship.

name: International Evangelical Church
description: International Evangelical Church in Cyprus is a biblical evangelical congregation emphasizing worship, Christian baptism, and adherence to historical Christian creeds including the Apostles', Nicene, and Athanasian Creeds.

name: International Evangelical Church
description: International Evangelical Church is a biblical, evangelical church in Larnaca, Cyprus emphasizing traditional Christian doctrines including the Apostles' Creed, Nicene Creed, and Westminster standards.

name: International Evangelical Church Abu Dhabi
description: International Evangelical Church Abu Dhabi is a Non-denominational church in Abu Dhabi, UAE, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: International Evangelical Church of the Algarve
description: we are an interdenominational fellowship of Christians who accept the Bible as God’s absolute authority over our lives and church. Although we are not affiliated to any specific evangelical denomination, we consider ourselves to be part of the spiritual worldwide family of God’s people. Our message is one of seeking to proclaim the Gospel of the Lord Jesus Christ and teaching the whole Bible as the inspired and infallible Word of God. Portuguese Language service (with a possibility of translation into Russian on demand) Sunday: 3-30 pm Russian-speaking group in Albufeira: Edf. Visa Choro, Lote 9-10, R. Manuel Teixeira Gomes, 8200-291 Albufeira. Sunday 11-00am. Minister: Hleb Yermakou, Phone No +351 960 460 577

name: International Evangelical Church, Valencia
description: International Evangelical Church Valencia brings together people from diverse nationalities and cultures for worship in both English and Spanish. The church offers multiple Sunday services, including evening options, plus live-streaming for remote participation and regularly runs Alpha courses in both languages.

name: International Evangelical Lutheran Church
description: Luther Church Helsinki is an international evangelical Lutheran congregation located in Kamppi city center, offering services in both English and Finnish. As part of the Lutheran Evangelical Association of Finland (LEAF), the church emphasizes active mission work both locally and overseas, viewing Helsinki as a mission field where they share the gospel in a country often assumed to already be reached.

name: International Gospel Center
description: International Gospel Center is an evangelical church in Berlin that conducts services in four languages: German, Russian, Ukrainian, and English. The church serves a diverse multicultural congregation with regular worship services led by pastors Igor and Valentina Ivannik, along with special holiday celebrations including Easter and Pentecost festivals.

name: International Protestant Church of Brussels
description: Moving to a new home in a new city in a new country can be a daunting experience. Many of us have had that experience, and one of the first things we discover is that we miss our “roots”. For others of us, Belgium is home … it’s a place where we have put down our “roots”. For still others, we’re not sure what the future holds, but we know that, wherever we are, we need to stay “rooted”. At IPC, we’re “rooted” in Jesus Christ, and connected to one another as a family. The best way to get to know the “family” is to see us in work and in play. So come on, join us in our sharing time.

name: International Reformed Evangelical Church (IREC) Hamburg
description: IREC Hamburg offers a unique trilingual worship experience with services conducted in English and translation available in German and Indonesian. The church combines Reformed theology with evangelical passion, featuring organic small groups, an active choir, and regular prayer meetings that bring together people from diverse cultural backgrounds.

name: International Reformed Evangelical Church Berlin
description: International Reformed Evangelical Church in Berlin We are Bible-believing, Reformed church that aims to share the Gospel to the people in Berlin. Join us every Sunday for worship.

name: Internationale Freikirche
description: Internationale Freikirche serves Cologne's diverse community with Sunday worship conducted in German and simultaneous translation provided in Farsi, English, and Korean. This evangelical congregation emphasizes biblical preaching with practical life applications, as evidenced by their sermon series addressing topics like building your life on God's foundation and finding true freedom through the Gospel.

name: Internationale Freikirche Köln
description: Internationale Freikirche Köln conducts Sunday services in German with simultaneous translation provided into Farsi, English, and Korean, making worship accessible to diverse international communities. This evangelical congregation emphasizes biblical teaching through regular sermons and offers ministries including worship, Bible study, and missions work.

name: Internationale Gemeinde Köln
description: Internationale Gemeinde Köln is a non-denominational church based in Cologne, Germany. As an international congregation, they likely serve a diverse, multicultural community in one of Germany's major cities.

name: Ipue Barcelona 2 Iglesia Pentecostal Unida En Europa
description: Ipue Barcelona 2 is a Spanish-speaking Pentecostal church serving the European community with traditional Pentecostal worship emphasizing the gifts of the Spirit. As part of the United Pentecostal Church in Europe network, we offer services entirely in Spanish for Hispanic families and individuals seeking authentic Pentecostal fellowship in Barcelona.

name: Ivy Church Bristol
description: Ivy Church Bristol is an Assemblies of God congregation that meets both in-person and via Zoom for Sunday worship at 10:30am. This pentecostal evangelical church runs comprehensive programs from Ivy Tots through Ivy Youth, plus Alpha courses and LiFE groups for spiritual growth.

name: JPCC (Jakarta Praise Community Church)
description: JPCC (Jakarta Praise Community Church) is a Non-denominational church in Jakarta, Indonesia, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: Jurbise International Bible Church

In Christ the differences of color and culture enrich us rather than divide us! IBC is a caring congregation committed to the mission of helping people become faithful Christ followers. Here you will find a warm welcome and ample opportunity to grow in your relationship with Jesus and His multi-national church. Welcome!

name: KBH Frikirke

The church operates EksistensAkademiet, offering semester-based academic lectures, alongside regular netværksgrupper that meet bi-weekly in homes and monthly Game Night events for young people seeking community.

name: Kaiserslautern Faith Baptist Church
description: We are a family of Christians that is biblically faithful, doctrinally shaped, morally tough, intellectually vibrant, and has a deep and abiding faith in the Lord Jesus Christ that we might fulfill the Great Commission for the glory of God. Moreover, we are an English-speaking church serving both the American military community and the various expatriate residents in and around Kaiserslautern, Germany.

Kandern Black Forest Christian Fellowship
description: BFCF is a gathering of brothers and sisters who are zealous to display the glory of God by sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ and our lives as well (1 Thess 2:8). We meet weekly at the auditorium of Black Forest Academy and would love to have you join us!

name: Kantonalkirche Schaffhausen

The church emphasizes practical discipleship and equipping ministry alongside contemporary worship led by their dedicated worship team. Their focus on evangelism and discipleship training reflects their commitment to developing mature believers who can engage meaningfully with their faith.

Kirche für dich

Their Evening School program provides interactive Bible study combining teaching with small group application, while their multi-generational approach includes specialized ministries for every life stage from children to families.

name: Kirche im Pott e.V.
description: Kirche im Pott is an evangelical church meeting across three campuses in Germany's Ruhr region, offering bilingual services with English translation available in Bochum and Dortmund. The church features an innovative Evening School program for interactive Bible study and maintains ministries spanning all age groups from kids to seniors.

name: Krakow New Covenant Church
description: New Covenant Church Krakow is an evangelical church that meets in Krakow, Poland. We are a group of friends from many different nations with a passion for God. We desire to serve God, and see His kingdom grow. We love to spend time worshipping God, praying, learning the Word of God, having fellowship with each other, and helping others. We have been meeting in Krakow since 2006.

name: Kristi Kirke København
description: Kristi Kirke København is an evangelical church serving Copenhagen with services in both Danish and English. The church stands out for its comprehensive life-stage ministries, including specialized groups for youth, couples, women, and men, plus annual family and New Year camps that build lasting community bonds.

name: Kristianiakirken
description: Kristianiakirken is a non-denominational evangelical church in Oslo that combines contemporary worship with traditional liturgical elements like Vesper evening prayer services. The church emphasizes close-knit fellowship through their Connect house groups (småfellesskap) and offers a distinctive blend of modern evangelical faith with historical Christian practices.

name: Kristkirkens Sogn
description: Kristkirkens Sogn is an evangelical church offering worship and programs entirely in Danish, from infant singing groups (Babysalmesang) through their acclaimed Kolding Gospel Kids choir. The congregation actively supports international missions in Papua New Guinea and Cambodia while fostering strong intergenerational connections through their extensive age-specific ministries.

name: Kwanglim Methodist Church
description: Kwanglim Methodist Church is a Methodist church in Seoul, South Korea, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: Københnerkirken
description: Købnerkirken is an evangelical church serving the Amager community with Danish-language worship and an unusually diverse range of ministries. From their gospel choir and scouting group to their food club and beer brewing group (Øllauget), this church creates multiple ways for people to connect through shared interests while exploring faith together.

name: Købnerkirken
description: Købnerkirken is a Danish-speaking Baptist church that stands out for its musical heritage through the Amager Gospelkor and comprehensive programming spanning all ages. The church operates unique ministries including Amagerbro Spejderne (scouting), Øllauget (beer club), and Madklubben (food club), creating diverse pathways for community connection beyond traditional worship.

name: L'Église catholique à Marseille
description: The Catholic Diocese of Marseille encompasses 102 parishes throughout the city, conducting services in French under the leadership of Cardinal Jean-Marc Aveline. This diocese distinguishes itself through its Mediterranean-focused spirituality and extensive interfaith dialogue, alongside specialized ministries for migrants and comprehensive cultural programming including sacred art exhibitions.

name: LIFE Church Bradford
description: LIFE Worship produces original worship songs encouraging unity and intimacy with God. Albums include Speak To The Storm and Wide Open Space.

The congregation emphasizes biblical teaching and spiritual worship, describing themselves as a place where members experience God's presence through faith and praise.

description: La Buena Nueva Iglesia offers structured biblical education through their weekly Escuela Bíblica Evangélica de Valencia every Monday, alongside comprehensive programming for all ages from children to their 'Viejóvenes' (older youth) group. The church provides both in-person and online worship options, with Sunday services live-streamed on YouTube and hybrid prayer meetings throughout the week.

name: Lagoa Christian Fellowship
description: Our fellowship has been established as a Bible believing and Bible teaching church for well over 14 years. As part of the Calvary Chapel family we are blessed to be able to have great accountability and relationships across the world, as we serve alongside each other in the great commission we have been given by Jesus Christ. "Go therefore and make disciples of all the nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit, teaching them to observe all that I commanded you."

The services are spoken in Portuguese and simultaneously translated into English, the songs of praise are all bilingual and are projected also in Portuguese and English.​​ ​

Afterwards, we have refreshments and spend time together. All immigrants, students, multicultural families, and Finns having an international heart.

So if you’re looking for a place where you can connect with real people just like you, then we’d love to have you come and see what’s happening here.

description: Our Vision, Our vision can be summarised as Rooted in the Gospel, Radical transformation. That as individuals and as a church, we would be so deeply rooted in the gospel, and the gospel so deeply rooted in us, that it would have a wonderful, transforming effect on our lives. Our Values, Worship, We want God to be the passion of our lives and to worship Him for who He is. The Gospel, We want all our people to live in the good of, and forever be grateful to God for all that Jesus Christ has done for us through His death and resurrection. Biblical Teaching, We are committed to, and passionate about, biblical teaching and preaching. Across all the age groups in the church we want our teaching to grow in us a love for God, and a desire to live for His glory, in every area of our lives.

description: ICF is a non-denominational Christian church with a wealth of cultures represented in our congregation.nnWe believe in God the Father, the Son and the Holy Spirit. We believe that as followers of Christ the fruit and the gifts of the Holy Spirit should be evident in our lives.nnWe are a growing church desiring to be God’s hands and feet in our society.nnWe are family orientated with a large section of our congregation being made up of youth.

description: The Bible is the central feature in all that we do at AIC Limassol. We believe it is the inspired Word of God. Consequently, all that we do in our services reflect the standard that God lays out for us. In our worship we begin and end with God’s praise, in prayer and song, we read from the Bible, explain it and apply it to our daily lives.

name: Luther Church Helsinki
description: Luther Church Helsinki is an international Lutheran congregation located in Kamppi city center, serving both English and Finnish speakers with traditional Lutheran theology and sacraments. The church emphasizes active mission work locally and globally, viewing Helsinki as a mission field and encouraging members to share the Gospel in their daily lives.

name: Lutheran Church
description: The Evangelical-Lutheran Church in Denmark (folkekirken) serves as Denmark's national church with 71% of the population as members, offering worship services in both Danish and English. This historic church provides unique ministries including baby hymn singing and rhythmic choir alongside traditional Lutheran sacraments and comprehensive counseling services for both Danish residents and newcomers to the country.

name: Luxembourg All Nations Church
description: All Nations Church of Luxembourg is made up of people from many countries that are seeking and following the triune God. As a church we focus on the historic essentials of the Christian faith as reflected in the early creed. Together we seek to celebrate & worship the God who made and loves the diverse people of this world.

name: Luxembourg Church of the Incarnation
description: We are an ecumenical English-speaking church which draws upon the breadth and depth of the Christian tradition. We practice the ancient form of liturgical worship with a modern spirit, addressing the present and future through the wisdom of the past.

name: Luxembourg Oasis Church of God
description: Oasis Church of God is an English-speaking church of many nationalities, meeting in Luxembourg City for our Sunday worship service plus many locations around for Home Groups. Oasis is full Gospel, evangelical and Pentecostal, in other words we try to bring Jesus Christ and the Word of God to life in relevant and meaningful ways to touch people’s lives. Why? Many people come to Luxembourg with little or no support, so we are here for you – not just for your spiritual care, but also with help to assist you to integrate into this wonderful country.
location: 72 rue Dernier Sol in Luxembourg City

name: Luzern International Church
description: As the only English speaking congregation in the Canton of Lucerne, ICL draws people from across every conceivable national, ethnic, economic, and denominational barrier. In spite of our amazing diversity we strive to maintain a God-glorifying unity in Christ.

name: Lymington United Reformed Church
description: Lymington United Reformed Church is an united_reformed church in Lymington. Explore their worship and community details before your first visit.

name: MELBOURNE COMMUNITY CHURCH
description: Melbourne Community Church is a welcoming community focused on reflecting the love of Christ through Sunday worship and outreach. They recently relocated to West Melbourne.

name: Maastricht - Redeemer International Church
description: We are a young, vibrant and growing, international English speaking church community based in the city centre of Maastricht. A home to many locals and foreigners. ​ We love God, people, Maastricht and the nations and it would be great if you could be part of our church family., Besides our Sunday services, there are several meetings during the week where you can meet up with God and grow in your relationship with Him.

name: Madrid Immanuel Baptist Church
description: We seek to be a community of faith where Jesus is honored as Lord and Savior, where His Holy Spirit is free to accomplish His convicting, healing, saving work in all hearts, where Scripture is the beloved norm that informs all our faith and practice, where people of all races, ages, and cultures find themselves drawn into God’s presence, where discipleship to Jesus is intentional and opportunities to grow and serve abound, where Christ’s Great Commission is taken as seriously as His commandment to love.

name: Madrid International Church
description: An evangelical international church in Madrid for people of all nations and walks of life.

name: Madrid Mountainview International Church
description: Mountainview, in northwest Madrid, is an English-speaking, non-denominational Christian Church of internationally minded people where all are welcome. There is so much to unpack from that summary statement! We could tell you about…, * our Sunday worship (in English with translation into Spanish most weeks) which includes singing, prayer, and teaching rooted in the Bible. There are also specific opportunities for children to learn and grow., * the joy we experience as we develop friendships over coffee or tea before and after the service, at our monthly fellowship lunches, and as we serve together., * various small groups meeting throughout the week that are a great place to grow closer to God and to each other., * chances to serve each other and the world around us. But you would best discover who we are by meeting us in person. We are eager to warmly welcome you should you decide to join us on a Sunday morning!

name: Malaga Christian Center

description: Back to Bible Community Church is an International Church in Lund, near to Malmo, Sweden. A community reaching out to communities. We are ready to love, care and serve our city of Lund and the world around us and to see it fully imparted by God's Spirit and the power of the gospel which is able, to save and deliver all. You 're welcome to visit and to be part of our family....

name: Malmo International Christian Fellowship
description: We are an International Christian Fellowship that meets every Sunday for services in English. Everything we do, Sunday services, Bible study, Prayer meetings, fellowship etc, we do in English. So if you are an English speaker you will feel at home. In our Fellowship you will meet people from every continent. We are creating a fellowship that transforms our lives and together we are building a "home far away from home". To fulfill the Great Commission while demonstrating the Great Commandment. We take this mission from Matthew 28:19 and Luke 10: 27 Matthew 28:19 - Therefore go and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit Luke 10:27 - He answered, “‘Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your strength and with all your mind’; and, ‘Love your neighbor as yourself.

The church follows traditional Pentecostal theology with a focus on personal relationship with Jesus Christ, baptism in the Holy Spirit, and divine healing.

name: Malta Bible Baptist Church
description: You will find a friendly welcome here at the Bible Baptist Church Malta. Come worship with us as we sing praises to God in English and Maltese, listen to the reading and preaching of the Word of God, and pray for the needs of one another. Our desire is for people to be Born Again, trusting the Lord Jesus Christ as their personal Saviour and going on to become fully devoted followers of Jesus Christ.

name: Monaco Faith Hope Love
description: We are a church in the heart of Monaco inviting people to live Faith, share Hope and experience the Love of Christ in our lives. Our aims are to allow everyone, whatever their religious denomination and their origins, to praise the Lord Jesus Christ within the framework of the Christian evangelical tradition. We wish to share the gospel with any Christian and non-Christian who seeks to know the teachings of the bible. We seek to live the message of the Bible in accordance with the gospel so that the latter will dictate their conduct and cause them to follow Christ. We recognise Jesus Christ as the Son of God, who died on the cross for the sins of men and rose to give eternal salvation to those who believe in Him. We recognize that salvation is only granted by the grace of God, through faith in Jesus Christ.

Men and women from over 50 countries gather to worship the triune and living God in English. Our ongoing mission is to export disciple makers throughout the world as they come to Munich and then are launched out into other locations around the globe.

description: We are a community of people who have placed their faith in Jesus Christ and seek to follow him daily. People from all nations and walks of life visit and worship with us every Sunday. We gather weekly in two locations to sing, pray, learn from the bible, and encourage one another in our faith. While the service is in English, direct French translation is available through headphones., You are invited to join our church service whether you've been a Christian for many years, or are just trying to understand what Christianity is all about., Browse through the pages to learn more about the ministries our church offers or to find resources to develop your faith. name: Nidaros Cathedral (Nidarosdomen)
description: Nidarosdomen serves as Norway's national sanctuary and has been a pilgrimage destination for nearly 1000 years as the burial church of St. Olav the Holy. This Gothic masterpiece offers Lutheran worship services in both Norwegian and English, while also functioning as a living cathedral with an active restoration workshop listed on UNESCO's intangible cultural heritage list.

name: Nidarosdomen
description: Nidarosdomen is Norway's national sanctuary and a Gothic masterpiece that has served as St. Olav's burial church and pilgrimage destination for nearly 1000 years. This Lutheran cathedral in Trondheim offers worship services in Norwegian and English, along with guided tours that showcase its remarkable restoration work and rich history. The cathedral operates alongside the Archbishop's Palace and houses the Norwegian Crown Jewels, making it both an active place of worship and a significant cultural heritage site.

name: Paris Rueil Emmanuel International Church
description: Emmanuel International Church is committed to providing English language ministry to glorify God in the culturally rich and global region of Paris. Out of grateful hearts that have been transformed by Him both individually and as a community, we worship Jesus believing that he died for our sins and rose again in triumph over death., We are committed to the witness of the Bible, believing it is completely trustworthy and sufficient for teaching us about God and ourselves. This commitment motivates us to grow together in Christ and equips us for every good work., Therefore, we strive to love our city and our world, seeking to bring them this precious gospel because of the peace and redemption that it brings.

You will see people wearing many different styles of clothing – from suits to jeans. You can wear what is comfortable for you!

description: Parroquia San Bonifacio serves the Guindalera neighborhood of Madrid with traditional Catholic worship and active spiritual formation programs. The parish offers weekly Eucharistic Adoration on Thursday evenings, organized spiritual retreats (Retiros Emaús) for men and women, and specialized groups for married couples seeking faith-based community.

name: Parroquia San Bonifacio. Archidiócesis de Madrid. Iglesia
description: Parroquia San Bonifacio serves the Guindalera neighborhood of Madrid with weekly Eucharistic Adoration every Thursday at 8:15 PM as a central devotional practice. The parish offers specialized Emmaus retreats for both men and women, along with active groups for married couples and youth seeking spiritual formation.

name: Parroquia San Juan Apóstol y Evangelista
description: This Catholic parish in Massamagrell offers multiple daily Mass times including three services on Sundays. The church maintains traditional devotional practices with weekly Eucharistic Adoration every Wednesday and daily Rosary prayers from Monday through Saturday.

name: Parroquia San Juan Apóstol y Evangelista
description: This Catholic parish in Massamagrell offers multiple daily Masses in Spanish with a rich liturgical life centered on Eucharistic adoration. The church holds Adoración del Santísimo every Wednesday at 6 PM and daily rosary prayers, creating a devotional rhythm for parishioners seeking deeper spiritual practice.

name: Parroquia San Juan Evangelista
description: Grupo de Adoración Nocturna is a Catholic association of 40 members who gather on the first Friday of each month from 9pm to midnight for nighttime Eucharistic adoration. This Spanish-speaking group takes turns keeping vigil through the night hours, worshiping God on behalf of all humanity and following Christ's example of adoring the Father.

name: Parroquia Santa Cristina y Santa Margarita María de Alacoque
description: This Catholic parish in Madrid offers an exceptionally rich musical life with five different choirs including the distinctive Coral Iberoamericana and polyphonic prayer groups. The parish also operates a unique ecological garden ministry (Huerto Ecológico) inspired by Laudato Sí, alongside comprehensive sacramental preparation and multiple daily masses at two temple locations.

name: Parroquia de San Agustín
description: Parroquia de San Agustín is a historic Catholic church officially declared a Bien de Interés Cultural (Cultural Heritage Site) that offers traditional organ music and live-streamed masses. The parish provides extensive sacramental opportunities with multiple daily masses, regular confession hours, and monthly nocturnal adoration services on the first Monday of each month.

name: Parroquia de Santa Cristina y Santa Margarita María de Alacoque
description: This Catholic parish in Madrid offers an exceptionally rich musical life with multiple choirs including the distinctive Coral Iberoamericana, plus youth and polyphonic prayer groups. The parish also stands out for its Laudato Sí ecological garden ministry and comprehensive formation programs including adult catechumenate and biblical studies.

name: Parroquia del Buen Suceso
description: This Catholic chapel specializes in Perpetual Eucharistic Adoration, operating Monday through Friday from 9:30 AM to 9:30 PM, with all-night adoration on Wednesdays and Thursdays. Located at Princesa 43 in Madrid, the chapel serves as a dedicated space for continuous prayer and adoration, with coordinators working toward true 24/7 perpetual adoration.

name: Parròquia Mare de Déu de la Medalla Miraculosa
description: This Catholic parish in Barcelona offers worship and ministries in both Spanish and Catalan, serving the city's diverse community. The church stands out for its exceptional range of over 30 active programs, from biblical studies groups and youth ministries to specialized outreach for elderly parishioners and comprehensive catechesis programs for all ages.

name: Parròquia Mare de Déu de la Medalla Miraculosa de Barcelona
description: This Barcelona Catholic parish serves both Spanish and Catalan-speaking communities with over 30 specialized ministries ranging from biblical formation to youth programs like Edge Lifeteen. The church offers comprehensive spiritual growth opportunities including prayer schools, marriage preparation, and active social outreach through Cáritas and elderly care programs.

name: Partille Pingstförsamling
description: Vallhamrakyrkan is a Pentecostal congregation in Sävedalen, Partille that brings together people of different backgrounds, ages, and nationalities united in following Jesus. The church offers distinctive ministries including RPG small groups for deeper fellowship and operates Prästkragens förskola, their own preschool program.

name: Paróquia Nossa Senhora da Consolação e Correia
description: Esta paróquia católica em Belo Horizonte tem suas raízes no Colégio Santo Agostinho desde 1934, mantendo forte tradição agostiniana e devoção especial a Nossa Senhora da Consolação e Correia. A igreja oferece programa completo de sacramentos e catequeses, incluindo iniciação cristã para adultos e ação pastoral social ativa. Recentemente se tornou local permanente de veneração da relíquia de primeiro grau de São Carlo Acutis.

name: Paróquia de Sant'Ana
description: Brazil's first Perpetual Adoration Sanctuary, established in 1814 in downtown Rio de Janeiro, has maintained continuous eucharistic adoration since 1926. The parish houses one of the world's largest monstrances (2.5 meters tall) and serves as a historic center of Catholic devotion in the heart of Rio.

name: Potters Church

description: LifeHouse Poznań is a vibrant and growing church. We have a heart to see people connect with Jesus and become passionate followers of Christ., We believe that God has called LifeHouse to be a large, Jesus centred church, full of grace and truth, reaching and equipping all generations around the world.

name: Prague Christian Fellowship
description: Církev Křesťanské společenství - "KS" (Christian Fellowships) are independent, indigenous Czech churches (registered with the Czech Ministry of Culture) formally established in 1990. With contemporary worship services, Bible-based teaching, and an emphasis on meeting regularly in small groups to build relationships, the denomination has grown quickly. There are now about a dozen KS congregations in Prague and close to fifty throughout the Czech Republic. PCF is their only English-speaking international community (+/- 30% Czechs & 70% internationals from all over the world).

name: Prague Christian Fellowship
description: Prague Christian Fellowship is a Non-denominational church in Prague, Czech Republic, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: Prague English-Speaking United Methodist Church
description: We’re an English-Speaking Christian church in Prague, consisting of Czechs and internationals. We get together weekly for worship, Bible study, and fellowship. All are welcome to participate in our activities, regardless of beliefs and experience. Please join us in learning about the love of God, the salvation that Jesus freely offers us, and in putting our faith to practice by the guidance of the Holy Spirit. Your spiritual growth is our priority.

name: Prague Faith Community Church
description: We are a congregation of the International Presbyterian Church located in Prague, Czech Republic. Please join us for worship at 16:00 on Sunday afternoons at our location in Prague 7 and for fellowship groups throughout the week. Hope to see you there!

name: Prague International Baptist Church
description: The International Baptist Church of Prague (IBCP) is an international, multicultural, congregation seeking to be faithful disciples of Jesus Christ. We affirm the central truth of the Christian faith and are committed to putting the Bible and prayer at the heart of all we do, as we seek to live out Christ’s love in a nurturing community. We welcome people from any background, whether you are working, studying or living in Prague or just visiting, we’d love for you to join us. We love to welcome newcomers, whether you are seeking to find out more about Jesus or whether you are after a church family where you can serve and grow as a Christian. We are a member of the International Baptist Convention, the organisation that unites English-speaking Baptist churches worldwide. We are affiliated with the Czech Baptist Union (Bratrská Jednota Baptistu) and, through them, to the European Baptist Federation. We are committed to co-operating with other Christians in ecumenical service and worship.

name: Prague International Church
description: The International Church of Prague is a friendly, interdenominational church based near Andel. We’re committed to worshiping Jesus Christ, growing in His image, building strong communities, working with Czech Christians and taking the good news of Jesus Christ to all people. We are interdenominational; this means that we are independent and autonomous in our governing structure. People from various traditions within Christianity co-operate freely in active membership, emphasizing those biblical truths which unite us in our love for the Lord Jesus and each other.

People from all nations and walks of life visit and worship with us every Sunday. We gather weekly in two locations to sing, pray, learn from the bible, and encourage one another in our faith. While the service is in English, direct French translation is available through headphones., You are invited to join our church service whether you've been a Christian for many years, or are just trying to understand what Christianity is all about., Browse through the pages to learn more about the ministries our church offers or to find resources to develop your faith. Sunday mornings we have Bible study classes for children as well as childcare for 0-4 year olds during the worship service. We have ongoing activities for the whole family, youth, young adults, women, men, and children designed to provide spiritual growth, family fellowship, and build life-long friendships while centering around God’s Word for us today. It is our goal that everyone will be able to find a place at NSBC.

A great first step is to join us at Kalev 17, at 10:00 on Sunday to meet the people of TIF, worship with us and study the word of God together. description: Our service is in English because it's a convenient international language, but we welcome people from around the world. You'll see people from China, Korea, India, Nigeria, Georgia, Germany, the United Kingdom, Canada, the United States, Brazil, and many other countries.​ Before the service, we have coffee, juice and snacks available for you near the entrance. There is also a welcome table where you can introduce yourself and ask any questions.​ During the service, we sing songs of praise to God, confess our sins together and hear God’s assurance of pardon, listen to a Christ-centred message based on a passage from the Bible, take up a voluntary offering, and, every three weeks, take holy communion together. Near the end of the service, we invite our guests to stand up and introduce themselves, if they want. We always try to give a warm welcome, because we all know what it feels like to be a stranger!
location: We meet near 9 Besarion Jgenti St in Tbilisi. Look for the white building with the large cross in front.

name: Tirana International Protestant Assembly
description: IPA Tirana is the international church for Albania’s capital city. We are a community of internationally-minded followers of Jesus Christ, who are seeking to demonstrate the love of God to our world, our nations, our city and each other. We want to see the people in Tirana and Albania living joyous, abundant, Holy Spirit-led lives, reconciled to their holy heavenly Father God through an ever deepening relationship with Jesus Christ. It is our aim to facilitate a deeper relationship with Jesus Christ through all that we do. You are welcome to join us for various activities throughout the week, and on Sunday mornings at 10:30 for our International Celebration Service.

name: Torino International Church

name: Trondheim International Church
description: Trondheim International Church is a reformed evangelical congregation serving both English and Norwegian speakers in central Trondheim. As an independent international church, we bring together believers from diverse backgrounds for Sunday worship, midweek Bible study and prayer meetings, and active missions work. Our city center location makes us easily accessible by public transportation for both locals and the international community.

name: Trondheim Misjonskirke
description: Hjem is an evangelical church in central Trondheim that conducts services in Norwegian and emphasizes building God's family through fellowship. The congregation offers regular prayer meetings, weekly open lunches on Wednesdays, and maintains an active worship ministry with recorded sermons available online.

name: Trossamfunnet Oslokirken
description: Oslokirken is a Pentecostal church in Oslo led by pastors Aina and Jan-Aage Torp, offering worship services in both Norwegian and Swedish. The church operates through house fellowships rather than traditional services and focuses on training community leaders while maintaining independence through voluntary donations without public funding.

name: Turku Cathedral
description: Turku Cathedral serves as Finland's national sanctuary and the home church of both the Archbishop and Bishop of Turku. This historic medieval Lutheran cathedral uniquely combines active worship with cultural programming, hosting regular concerts, lectures, and art exhibitions alongside traditional services in Finnish, Swedish, and English.

name: Turku Cathedral International Congregation
description: Located in Finland's historic Turku Cathedral, this Lutheran congregation offers worship services alongside extensive community programs including family groups, youth ministry, and adult education. The church provides comprehensive pastoral care and marriage counseling, while actively engaging in mission and aid work both locally and internationally.

Virgilio Anota Jr, we emphasize baptism in Jesus' name, Holy Ghost infilling, and comprehensive biblical teaching through multiple weekly services including Tuesday prayer meetings, Wednesday Bible studies, and special monthly gatherings like overnight prayer sessions.

name: United Pentecostal Church in Pasay

Our community actively engages in prayer and fasting, youth ministry, and local outreach programs throughout Pasay City.

name: University Baptist Church
description: University Baptist Church Manila conducts worship services in both English and Filipino, serving a diverse congregation in the heart of Manila. The church stands out with its Hosanna Playhouse theater ministry and extensive missions program that reaches multiple provinces across the Philippines through their YLSC initiative.

name: University Baptist Church, Incorporated
description: University Baptist Church Manila is a Baptist evangelical congregation offering services in both English and Filipino. The church operates the Youth Life Student Center with locations across Metro Manila and surrounding provinces, demonstrating their commitment to reaching students and young people through strategic outreach ministry.

name: Uppsala Missionskyrka
description: Uppsala Missionskyrka is a mission church in Uppsala, Sweden with an active website featuring event calendars and community information.

name: Upton Baptist Church
description: Upton Baptist Church is a baptist church in Upton-Upon-Severn. Explore their worship and community details before your first visit.

name: Utrecht Motion Church
description: We are a lively, international church and enjoy meeting new people who walk into our church every Sunday who want to hear more about Jesus and worship Him with great music from our band. We have English translation available for you!

name: VIVE Church
description: VIVE Church operates 11 locations across three continents, from Silicon Valley to Rome to London, offering charismatic worship experiences in English, Spanish, and Italian. Founded by Pastors Adam and Keira Smallcombe, this rapidly expanding church emphasizes bringing 'heaven to earth' through their global mission and diverse international community.

name: Vallhamrakyrkan
description: Vallhamrakyrkan is a Pentecostal congregation in Sävedalen, Partille that brings together people of different backgrounds, ages, and nationalities united in following Jesus. The church offers distinctive RPG (fellowship groups) alongside traditional worship services, youth ministry, and operates their own preschool called Prästkragens förskola.

name: Van Road United Reformed Church
description: Van Road United Reformed Church is an united_reformed church in Caerphilly. Explore their worship and community details before your first visit.

name: Vantaa International Christian Fellowship
description: A church for believers from different countries and denominational backgrounds, united by our love for Christ. There are lots of people in our community who are broken, lonely, or seeking something more in life. But at VICF we invite all people into a life-giving community and help show them what it looks like to have a vibrant relationship with Jesus Christ. We often see how this transforms people and their families and helps them find true value and purpose.

name: Velkommen til Frelsesarmeen
description: Frelsesarmeen (The Salvation Army) combines evangelical worship with extensive social action, operating addiction recovery programs, prison ministries, elderly care, and emergency aid across Norway. This church serves both spiritual and practical needs, offering everything from Sunday services to job counseling, food assistance, and specialized programs like Home-Start family support.

name: Venlo Free Gospel Church
description: Freegospelchurch is a young dynamic community of believers who want to preach and spread the Gospel of Jesus Christ in all its fullness and glory.

name: Verona International Church
description: Verona International church, with the vision for all the nations that live in the town of Verona and around, with the purpose to increase the God kingdom in this region of Italy

name: Vicenza- Vicenza Bible Church
description: We meet near villaggio in the commercial district. Look for our flags!

description: Victoria Park Methodist Church is a methodist church in Bournemouth. Explore their worship and community details before your first visit.

name: Victory
description: Victory is a charismatic evangelical church in the Philippines offering bilingual services in English and Filipino. The church is known for its Victory Worship music ministry and comprehensive digital presence including podcasts and a mobile app for staying connected with teachings and community updates.

name: Victory Bible Church International UK
description: Victory Bible Church International UK is a vibrant, full gospel charismatic church founded by Presiding Bishop Nii Apiakai Tackie-Yarboi, offering spiritual guidance and community worship.

name: Victory Chapel of Manchester
description: Victory Charismatic Chapel is a Spirit-filled church in Gorton that emphasizes charismatic worship and spiritual gifts. The church prioritizes accessibility with dedicated wheelchair spaces, hearing loop, and reserved parking, making worship truly available to all community members.

name: Victory Charismatic Chapel, Gorton, Manchester
description: Victory Charismatic Chapel is a Spirit-led church in Gorton, Manchester, emphasizing charismatic worship and biblical teaching. The church offers Bible study groups, dedicated children's and youth ministries, and holiday clubs for the community.

name: Victory Church Manila

name: Vienna Community Church
description: The Vienna Community Church was founded in 1957 to serve the needs of the international English-speaking community. Because of the diversity of Christian backgrounds within the international community it serves, the VCC has a broad and special mission in Vienna. The congregation is Bible-based, ecumenical, international and interdenominational, formally recognized by the Austrian Protestant Church, a member of the Association of International Churches of Europe and the Middle East (AICEME), and the American and Foreign Christian Union (AFCU).

name: Vienna English-Speaking United Methodist Church
description: The English-Speaking United Methodist Church of Vienna is an international, English-speaking Christian church rooted in the Wesleyan/Methodist tradition that welcomes all people to grow in Christ and seeks justice in our community and world. Our congregation is best described as having ‘open hearts, open minds, open doors.’ While our members come from forty countries on six continents and represent nearly every Christian tradition, we are united by our baptisms and faith in Jesus Christ and by our use of the English language.

name: Vienna​ International Baptist Church
description: We are a Bible-believing Church striving to be a living example of the Gospel we proclaim We seek to bring others to Christ and develop them in faith We commit ourselves to worship, to serve God and others, and to extend his kingdom

name: Viens et Vois Church Cape Town
Village Mosaïque
description: Village Mosaïque is an inclusive and open United Methodist church in Lausanne offering worship services and activities centered on solidarity, listening, and community living.

name: Vilnius International Church
description: We are a community of Christian believers who seek to live lives that give glory to our God and Saviour. We come from a variety of church backgrounds: Anglicans, Baptists, Lutherans, Methodists, Presbyterians, Reformed, Roman Catholics, non-denominational and others. The ICV is non-denominational, that is to say that we are not affiliated with any specific church. We aim to be a Christ-centred community where people from all church backgrounds can feel part of the family. We hold fast to the teachings of the Apostle’s Creed and seek to live in accordance with God’s revealed word, the Bible.
location: between Trakų gatvė and the Vilniaus rotušė (the old Town Hall). Go through the gate in the archway next to Žemaičių restaurant and the church door is 40m along on the left.

name: Vine Community Church
description: Vine Community Church in Cherry Willingham offers contemporary, informal worship with varied music styles and practical Bible teaching that connects faith to everyday life. The church stands out for its comprehensive community support through Assist, which provides one-to-one help during crises, plus specialized programs including dementia support and post office outreach. Services blend live and online options, with strong emphasis on midweek connection groups and extensive children's and youth programming.

name: Vineyard Amsterdam

The congregation offers Sunday worship services at 1 PM, weekly Tuesday coffee circles with meals on the first Tuesday of each month, and evening Bible study and prayer meetings.

name: Vähänkyrön vapaaseurakunta
description: Vähänkyrön Vapaaseurakunta is an evangelical Free Church in Vähäkyrö offering Sunday services at 1 PM conducted entirely in Finnish. The church maintains a consistent rhythm of fellowship with weekly Tuesday coffee circles, monthly community meals, and evening Bible study and prayer meetings.

name: Välkommen till Citykyrkan Göteborg / Citykyrkan

The church offers structured programs including verse-by-verse Bible studies on Tuesday evenings, early morning prayer meetings via Zoom, and 'Draget' youth ministry for children in grades 4-6.

name: WAO Malmö
description: WAO Malmö is a charismatic evangelical church that offers both Sunday morning (11:00) and Friday evening (19:00) services in Swedish, making worship accessible throughout the week. Founded in 2018 as part of a church planting vision, the congregation emphasizes creating a family atmosphere where every person feels at home, led by Pastor José Soto who is passionate about healing ministry and helping people connect with God as Father.

name: WCCRM LAGOS
description: WCCRM Lagos is a charismatic evangelical church that emphasizes the demonstration of God's power through their weekly Charismatic Hour sessions addressing life's problems. The church operates across multiple locations in Lagos and offers comprehensive spiritual development through specialized ministries including a unique 'deliverance hour' and 'prosperity touch' programs alongside traditional worship, youth, and community outreach ministries.

name: WE ARE ONE CHURCH
description: WAO Malmö is a charismatic evangelical church established in 2018 as part of the WE ARE ONE CHURCH movement's vision to plant 12 congregations across Sweden. Led by Pastor José Soto, the church offers both Sunday morning and Friday evening services in Swedish, along with dedicated youth ministry for grades 5-9.

name: Wade Street Church
description: Wade Street Church is a baptist church in Lichfield. Explore their worship and community details before your first visit.

name: Warsaw City Church
description: City Church is a church for people who don't do church. What does that mean? It means that we are trying to make space for those who’ve been turned off by traditional expressions of religion and Christianity. This also means that our community will be diverse, messy and beautiful. Our community is based on mutual understanding that we are all broken people in a need of authentic and meaningful relationships.

name: Warsaw Community Church
description: Warsaw Community Church is a Non-denominational church in Warsaw, Poland, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: Warsaw International Christian Fellowship
description: The International Christian Fellowship of Warsaw is an English-speaking church made up of people from over 30 nations, dozens of religious backgrounds, and many diverse cultures. They are committed to providing inspiring worship, relevant teaching, and authentic friendships. If you are looking for a church home while in Warsaw, or are just curious as to who they are, they invite you to come and join them.

The church provides comprehensive remote connectivity, including 24/7 online radio streaming, live events via Zoom, and direct digital communication with the diocesan pastor from anywhere.

The church offers Alpha courses for exploring Christian faith, runs Tweenies ministry for children ages 8-12 with Friday activities, and maintains an active youth program led by experienced staff.

description: Evangelical English-speaking church in Lausanne offering contemporary worship and Bible-centered teaching. They serve an international community with diverse ministries including youth groups, university students, and home groups.

name: Westminster Abbey
description: Westminster Abbey offers daily Anglican worship featuring the world-renowned Choir of Westminster Abbey, with sung evensong services that showcase centuries of sacred musical tradition. Services are held in this historic venue where worship has taken place since the tenth century, and visitors can attend in person or watch online from anywhere in the world.

name: Whitchurch Methodist Church
description: Whitchurch Methodist Church is a methodist church in Cardiff. Explore their worship and community details before your first visit.

name: White River Community Church
description: White River Community Church is a baptist church in St Austell. Explore their worship and community details before your first visit.

name: Wien Christian International Church
description: People who want to live their lives with God. People connect with God in different ways and we’ve discovered that our church helps us connect better. One of the ways God speaks to us is through His Word, the Bible. That’s why the sermons at our services are based on God’s Word, His Spirit and life experiences. We have found that the Bible is surprisingly applicable and relevant to daily life. Our music and songs are contemporary and the messages are in English with German translation or vice versa. If you are interested in how faith can have a positive effect on your daily life, free to visit one of our services anytime.

name: Wiesbaden Immanuel Baptist Church
description: Serving the English speaking community for over 60 years in Wiesbaden, Germany. Our church body is a rich mix of nations joined together by a love for Christ. We are dedicated to knowing God. If you are interested in having a personal relationship with the true and living God, please contact us.
