name: Würzburg - Jesus No Borders church
description: Jesus No Borders is a church and spiritual support center located in Wilhelm-Schwinn-Platz 2, Würzburg, Germany, providing a safe and welcoming place for people of all faiths and backgrounds. Our services and programs include Sunday services, Bible study, youth and adult education, outreach programs, and spiritual counseling and guidance. We strive to create a supportive and caring environment centered around Christ-centered life, abandoning traditions for Biblical truths, revolution and reconnection, and stripping of borders. If you’re looking for a place to practice your faith and grow spiritually, please don’t hesitate to contact us. We look forward to hearing from you!

name: Yerevan International Church
description: We are a group of people who have been captured by the love of Jesus. We are a part of God’s family and like all families, we love each other, we support one another, spend time together spurring each other on to follow Jesus. This works by having our roots in the love of the Father, being inspired by the compassion and teaching of Jesus His Son and being united in the joy of the Spirit We meet together every Sunday at 4pm and then also during the week at various venues. We warmly invite to come be part of our community.
location: Yerevan in the Armenian Missionary Association of America building

name: Ylistaron Helluntaiseurakunta
description: A Pentecostal church (Helluntaiseurakunta) described as 'a true congregation that loves God' based on their website tagline.

description: Young Church is an evangelical youth ministry of the Evangelical Church Community Berlin Alt-Buckow, offering confirmand classes, youth services, and weekly programs to help young people in the Neukölln district experience faith and find community.

name: Zagreb Baptist church - International
description: Welcome to our global community! Join us every Sunday at 12:00 for a unique and heartfelt gathering that celebrates diversity and unity in faith. We bring together individuals from all corners of the world, bound by shared beliefs and a desire for authentic community in the English language.

name: Zion Church
description: Zion Church is a Brazilian Pentecostal congregation conducting services entirely in Portuguese, serving Portuguese-speaking communities with traditional Pentecostal worship and theology. The church offers live-streamed services on YouTube and maintains active missions and baptism ministries, making it accessible to both local attendees and the broader Portuguese-speaking diaspora.

name: Zoe Church
description: Zoe Church is a Non-denominational church in Los Angeles, California, USA, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

name: Zurich International Christian Fellowship
description: ICF Zurich is a non-denominational church built with the Bible as its foundation. We dream of a dynamic church that is close to people’s lives and the heart of God.

name: Zürich International Baptist Church
description: International Baptist Church of Zürich is an English-speaking Christian fellowship located in Rüschlikon, a suburb of Zürich. The congregation encompasses people from all walks of life, many countries, and from various denominational backgrounds.

name: Zürich International Protestant Church
description: The International Protestant Church of Zurich is a non-denominational, international, self-supporting congregation serving the English-speaking community in Zürich and surrounding areas.

name: an English speaking Presbyterian Church in Paris
description: The Scots Kirk Paris serves an international congregation with English-language Reformed worship in the heart of Paris. This small Presbyterian community draws members from Scotland and around the world, offering both traditional worship services and a vibrant concert series throughout the year.

name: interchurch.dk
description: Folkekirkens Mellemkirkelige Råd serves as Denmark's interdenominational evangelical hub, conducting worship in both Danish and English. The church distinguishes itself through active international theological work, including ecumenical dialogue with global church organizations and specialized ministry programs for migrants and refugees.

name: l’église catholique dans le Rhône et le Roannais
description: This Catholic diocese serves the Rhône and Roannais regions with comprehensive French-language ministries including catechesis, youth confirmation, and active volunteer opportunities. The diocese maintains international connections through missions work, including a partnership with Koupéla, and offers extensive formation programs for spiritual growth.

name: mosaik.church

Services blend modern music with accessible preaching, and the church maintains a relaxed atmosphere with no dress code and comprehensive children's programs for all ages.

name: Åbenkirke Odense

The congregation reflects Marseille's diversity, bringing together people from various cultural backgrounds and educational levels, united by their commitment to Christ and Scripture study.

name: Église Connexion

name: Église Evangélique Libre

Services combine traditional worship with charismatic elements including prayer, praise, and communion, offered in both French and Portuguese with separate children's programs during Sunday gatherings.

name: Église Impact Centre Chrétien
description: Église Impact Centre Chrétien is a Non-denominational church in Paris, France, bringing people together through worship, teaching, and community.

description: A Protestant evangelical church in Lyon deeply committed to biblical teaching and glorifying God through prayer, scripture, and love for others. They center their message on Jesus Christ and His work.

The congregation emphasizes charismatic prayer ministry and meets Sundays at 10am and 4pm, with separate children's programs during afternoon services.

name: Église Évangélique de Paris 15
description: Evangelical church in Paris's 15th arrondissement offering weekly worship services, community groups for children, youth, women, and prayer meetings both online and in-person.

name: Église Évangélique de Pentecôte / Assemblée de Dieu de Nantes
Église Évangélique de Pentecôte de Saint-Denis
description: Eglise Évangélique de pentecôte de Saint-Denis is a Pentecostal church located in Saint-Denis, France. As a Pentecostal congregation, they emphasize the gifts of the Holy Spirit in their worship and spiritual practice.

name: Église Évangélique de la Pélisserie
description: Evangelical church in the French-speaking region of Switzerland, welcoming congregation focused on Christian faith and community.

name: Église Évangélique de réveil Rive Gauche
description: Eglise Evangélique de réveil Rive Gauche is a contemporary family church in Geneva that holds Sunday evening services at 17h00, making worship accessible for families with non-traditional schedules. The church combines evangelical teaching with strong community connections through home groups throughout the Rive Gauche area and dedicated children's ministry for ages 4-12 during services.

name: Église évangélique Versailles Grand Parc
description: An evangelical church in Versailles dedicated to living the Gospel together in simplicity and community.

name: Église évangélique baptiste de Paris Centre
Église évangélique l'Espérance
description: Église évangélique l'Espérance is a French-speaking evangelical church that particularly embraces families with children. The congregation offers structured age-specific programs during worship including 'Explos du Clos' for ages 6-10 and 'Aventuriers du Clos' for ages 10-13, while maintaining an environment where children's presence and energy are celebrated as part of the worship experience.
